---
title: "Meeka"
---

Hello! 

I write poems and occasionally post thoughts or small observations that don't really fit anywhere.

This is a space for those fragments, ranging from writing, ideas, and whatever else inspires me over time.
Or in other words: a place where poetry, thought, and learning coexist without hierarchy.

<figure>
  <img src="images/snoopy.jpg" width="800">
  <figcaption>Snoopy from *Peanuts* by Charles M. Schulz</figcaption>
</figure>

Created April 17, 2026.
